canonical.title: Git lesson from db8ef7f8aa1c
canonical.content:
Git lesson from db8ef7f8aa1c

Source commit: db8ef7f8aa1c
Paths: dist/dist.js, public/index.html, src/main.tsx
Summary: Add Instagram API headers to fix 400 errors - Add X-IG-App-ID: 936619743392459 header for Instagram web API - Add credentials: 'include' to send session cookies - Add res.ok check to gracefully handle failed requests - This fixes the 400 Bad Request errors on user info endpoint - Now the enrichment should successfully
